blurb_en:
Fifty-year-old erotic magazine photo spreads became the newest Cannes attraction, courtesy of generative AI.
• Norwegian production company Multiformat screened Sh(AI)ved at the Cannes market last week — short films made entirely from 1976 still images animated into video, complete with synchronized sound, dialogue, and voiceover.
• The films are now streaming on Cultpix; Blu-Ray and VHS releases are planned.
• Cultpix CEO Rickard Gramfors described the project as a conversation between past risque aesthetics and new technology. The 1970s subjects had no comment available.
• Review note from multiple outlets: the plasticky nature of AI becomes evident in extreme close-ups. Technology has its limits, and those limits are exactly where you would expect them.
• The films screened at the Cannes market, not the official competition — a distinction the festival's press office was quick to supply. Again.
• For the camera and imaging industry: AI that animates still photographs into video is the same capability being marketed as bring your memories to life in every consumer app. The starting material was just different here.
blurb_zh:
50年前情色杂志的静态图片，经由生成式AI复活，成了戛纳电影市场的新展映内容。
• 挪威制作公司Multiformat在戛纳市场展映了《Sh(AI)ved》——将1976年的静态图片转化为配有同步音效、对白和旁白的完整动态影像。
• 短片现已在邪典流媒体平台Cultpix上线；蓝光碟和VHS版本计划稍后发行。
• Cultpix首席执行官称此为「过去的感官美学与新技术之间的对话」。1976年的被摄对象无可奉告。
• 多家媒体均记录到同一细节：AI的塑料感在特写镜头中暴露无遗。技术确有极限，极限恰好在意料之中的地方。
• 展映地点是戛纳市场，非官方竞赛单元——官方发言人再次特别说明了这一区别。
• 将静态照片动态化的AI能力，与各大消费级应用中「让记忆活起来」的功能底层相同。只是起点不一样而已。
verification_notes: Variety (primary, 403 on direct fetch). Confirmed via IMDB news pickup, IBTimes UK (specific details including Gramfors quote and AI technique description), Far Out Magazine, style.news.am — all citing same Variety story. Project name Sh(AI)ved, director Thomas Meier, firm Multiformat, Cultpix streaming all confirmed across sources. Article date estimated ~May 22 during Cannes market (May 14-24).

blurb_en:
Anthropic is closing a second $30 billion funding round at over $900 billion pre-money valuation, expected to land this week — making it the most valuable AI startup in the world for the first time.
• Lead investors: Sequoia Capital, Dragoneer, Altimeter, and Greenoaks, each committing roughly $2 billion. Founders Fund and General Catalyst also participating.
• This is Anthropic's second $30 billion round in under four months; February's Series G priced the company at $380 billion.
• At $900 billion, Anthropic surpasses OpenAI's most recent $852 billion valuation — in the same week OpenAI filed its IPO and Anthropic reported its first profitable quarter.
• Anthropic told investors its annualized revenue will surpass $50 billion by end of June 2026, driven by 80x year-on-year growth.
• One AI company is going public while losing $1.22 per dollar earned. Its main competitor just became the most valuable startup in history while posting its first profit.
• Bloomberg reported the round had not formally closed as of May 22. As soon as next week was the phrase used. It is now that week.
blurb_zh:
Anthropic本周正在完成第二轮300亿美元融资，估值超过9000亿美元，将首次成为全球市值最高的AI初创公司。
• 领投方：红杉资本、Dragoneer、Altimeter和Greenoaks，各出资约20亿美元；Founders Fund和General Catalyst也参与其中。
• 这是Anthropic不到四个月内的第二轮300亿美元融资；2月的G轮定价仅为3800亿美元。
• 9000亿美元估值将首次超越OpenAI最近一轮融资的8520亿美元——同一周，OpenAI提交IPO申报，Anthropic公布首季盈利。
• Anthropic告知投资者，2026年6月底前年化营收将突破500亿美元，较去年增长80倍。
• 一家AI公司每赚1美元就亏1.22美元，高调上市。其主要竞争对手在悄然首次盈利后，登顶最有价值初创公司。
• 彭博社5月22日报道称融资尚未正式完成，原话是「最快下周」。本周就是那周。
verification_notes: Bloomberg (primary, paywalled). Confirmed via Business Standard quoting Bloomberg, TechTimes (May 23), Yahoo Finance, aithinkerlab, IBTimes. Specific investors (Sequoia, Dragoneer, Altimeter, Greenoaks at ~$2B each; Founders Fund, General Catalyst) confirmed across multiple secondary sources citing Bloomberg. $50B ARR by end of June and 80x growth confirmed. Distinct from 2026-05-06-anthropic-900b-valuation-round (initial April 29 TechCrunch speculation); this is Bloomberg confirmed May 22 with named investors and specific closing timeline.

blurb_en:
Apple does not do previews, but genai.apple.com went live this week — thirteen days before WWDC.
• Business Standard and MacDailyNews confirmed the new genai subdomain on May 26, describing it as the clearest signal yet of a major AI focus at WWDC June 8–12.
• Expected at WWDC: Siri 2.0 with on-screen context awareness, deep cross-app integration, and cross-conversation memory — a complete rearchitecture of the assistant.
• Apple is also reportedly preparing a standalone chatbot Siri intended to compete directly with ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude.
• iOS 27 additions expected: AI writing tools, AI-generated wallpapers, Suggested Genmoji.
• Apple has largely stayed quiet on generative AI while Google ran I/O and OpenAI ran daily product announcements this spring. WWDC is presumably the answer.
• The audience for this newsletter is predominantly Apple device users. Whatever ships on June 8 lands in the same ecosystem as every Insta360 app.
blurb_zh:
苹果不做预热，但genai.apple.com本周悄然上线——距WWDC还有十三天。
• 商业标准、MacDailyNews等于5月26日确认这一新子域名上线，称其为WWDC将以AI为核心主题的最明确信号。
• 预计WWDC发布：具备屏幕感知能力的「Siri 2.0」，深度跨应用整合，以及跨对话记忆——对这个助手的彻底重构。
• 苹果据报还在准备独立的对话式Siri，直接对标ChatGPT、Gemini和Claude。
• iOS 27预期AI新功能：AI写作工具、AI生成壁纸、「推荐Genmoji」。
• 今年春季，谷歌I/O和OpenAI接连发布，苹果相对沉默。WWDC大概率是回应。
• 本通讯读者大多使用苹果设备。6月8日的发布，将直接落地于Insta360应用所在的生态系统。
verification_notes: Business Standard (May 26), MacDailyNews May 26 (Apple stealth move signals major Generative AI push at WWDC 2026), eWeek WWDC 2026 AI preview. genai.apple.com domain creation confirmed across multiple outlets. WWDC June 8-12 schedule confirmed via Apple official announcement. Siri 2.0 and chatbot Siri details from MacRumors and eWeek WWDC preview.
